login.title: Welcome to EduKids
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your learning portal.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Document verification is required for teachers and parents.
signup.name: Full Name
signup.terms: By registering, you agree to our terms. Security is our priority.

dashboard.title: Parental Bridge
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor your child's mathematical journey and teacher insights.

progress.title: My Children
progress.createDesc: They will be linked to your account and can sign in immediately with the email and password you set.
progress.name: Name
progress.noChildren: You have no linked children yet. Click 'Add child account' to create an account for your child.

attendance.title: Attendance Log
attendance.subtitle: Monitor your child's presence and punctuality.

messages.title: Messages
messages.desc: A chat-style inbox for conversations with teachers and admins.

reportCard.title: Report Card
reportCard.desc: A printable report card layout with all subjects, grades, and comments will be rendered here.

dashboard.title: Math Controller
dashboard.subtitle: Efficiently manage your students and primary math lessons.
dashboard.uploadDesc: Publish PDF guides, worksheets, or video links directly to your students' study rooms.

attendance.title: Roll Call
attendance.subtitle: Daily attendance tracking for your assigned students.
attendance.empty: No students found in your roster.

courses.title: Curriculum
courses.subtitle: Manage your educational content and class material.
courses.subject: Subject

messages.title: Parental Communication
messages.subtitle: Keep parents informed about their child's daily school life.

dashboard.title: Governance Controller
dashboard.subtitle: Global oversight of the mathematical educational ecosystem.
dashboard.auditInit: Advanced audit logs are currently initializing
dashboard.auditDesc: The governance engine is monitoring all document verification requests in real-time.

users.title: User Governance
users.subtitle: Review credentials and manage platform access.

announcements.title: Global Announcements
announcements.subtitle: Broadcast system-wide alerts to users.
announcements.comingSoon: Announcement publishing interface will be available in the next system patch.

timetable.title: Master Timetable
timetable.subtitle: Synchronize global class schedules.
timetable.comingSoon: Drag-and-drop scheduling matrix will be available in the next system patch.

achievements.title: Trophy Room
achievements.subtitle: These badges show the adventures you've already completed in EduKids.
achievements.hint: Keep finishing your homework, participating in class, and doing your best. New badges will unlock automatically!

homework.title: Homework Missions
homework.empty: You don't have any homework yet. Your next missions will appear here.

courses.title: My Courses
courses.empty: No courses are linked to your class yet.

grades.title: My Scorecard
grades.empty: Your grades will appear here once your teacher has marked your tests and homework.
grades.subject: Subject

studyRoom.title: Study Room
studyRoom.subtitle: Access math guides, video lessons, and worksheets from your teacher.
studyRoom.empty: No materials found for your search
studyRoom.quote: Mathematics is not about numbers, equations, or algorithms: it is about understanding.
